name: core-grok
description: Grok port of the core baseline. Ships Grok-native judge-hook (PreToolUse rules engine with JSON decision, escalate via grok -p --effort medium; also fires on skyline_run), writing-guard (PreToolUse AI-tells guard), research-nudge (Stop hook), and the core guidelines for ~/.grok/AGENTS.md (including default-medium Grok spawn effort). /core-grok:setup seeds ~/.grok/judge-rules.json and writes the guidelines block. Hook commands use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time substitution.
